Sip Green.
Stay Unbothered.

Premium ceremonial matcha crafted for calm focus, clean energy and your daily ritual.

Free Shipping Japanese Ceremonial Grade
Shop Ceremonial Explore the Craft
Scroll to Brew

Shaded in Silence

Four weeks before harvest, tea fields are covered in dark screens, forcing the leaves to produce intense chlorophyll and rich L-theanine for a sweet, deep umami taste.

Hand-Selected Tencha

Only the tenderest top leaves are hand-picked by masters in early spring. The leaves are quickly steamed, air-dried, and sorted to extract pure "Tencha."

Slow Stone Grinding

Traditional granite mills turn the leaves into fine powder. To prevent friction heat from scorching the delicate aroma, a mill grinds just 30 grams per hour.

The Ultimate Whisk

Add hot water, grab the Chasen bamboo whisk, and stir vigorously in a W-pattern until a creamy jade froth crowns your bowl. A ritual of clarity.

Curated Selection

The Collection

Top Grade

Uji Ritual

Our highest ceremonial grade matcha. Exceptional sweet creaminess with zero bitterness, perfect for Usucha or Koicha preparation.

$38.00

Daily Zen

A balanced ceremonial grade suitable for daily lattes or traditional whisking. Vibrant color with a subtle earthy-nutty finish.

$26.00
Handcrafted

Chasen Bamboo Whisk

Traditional 100-prong whisk hand-carved from a single piece of golden bamboo. Essential for creating thick, micro-foam froth.

$22.00
Gen Z Favorite

Matcha Glow Elixir

Ceremonial grade matcha infused with grass-fed collagen peptides and hyaluronic acid for skin-glow hydration and clean daily energy.

$42.00
Vortex Speed

USB-C Electric Whisk

Premium matte black electric frother with a minimalist charging dock. Spindles at double-vortex speed to whip up cold lattes in under 10 seconds.

$28.00
Aesthetic Living

Iced Shaker Bottle

Double-walled high-borosilicate glass bottle with an aesthetic sage green silicone grip and a real wood lid. Features a built-in matcha filter.

$32.00
Science & Ritual

Coffee vs. Matcha

A side-by-side performance review. Clean energy meets sustainable wellness.

Coffee

The Scattered Rush

Energy Spike 80%
Post-Drink Crash 90%
Scattered Jitters 85%
Calming L-Theanine 0%
Antioxidant Level 15%
Cellular Hydration 20%

Matcha

The Sustained Flow

Sustained Energy 95%
Post-Drink Crash 5%
Focused Clarity 90%
Calming L-Theanine 92%
Antioxidant Level 100%
Cellular Hydration 85%

Ceremonial Grade

Uji Ritual

Kickstart your day with high-concentration amino acids and chlorophyll for steady 6+ hour energy.

Interactive Whisking Guide

Water Temperature 80°C
Matcha Powder 2.0g
Whisk Speed (Chasen) Medium
Perfect Harmony

An ideal temperature and dosage. Whisking at medium-to-fast speeds will unlock a smooth, velvety umami froth without any bitter notes.
